description: The Factory department structure. Each department has a lead artist, a set of agents, and a purpose. Departments coordinate through the pipeline but think independently through their lead artist's cognitive lens.

engineering.name: Engineering
engineering.description: Code quality, architecture, testing, verification. The production floor.

stack_types.name: Stack & Types
stack_types.description: Language selection, build systems, type safety, stack remediation. Making sure the foundation is right.

platform_infra.name: Platform & Infrastructure
platform_infra.description: CI/CD, PR management, deployment, branching. The machinery that ships.

security.name: Security
security.description: OWASP, supply chain, secret scanning, vulnerability detection. The locks on the doors.

reliability.name: Reliability & Observability
reliability.description: CI monitoring, deployment, production health. Making sure what ships stays up.

operations.name: Operations
operations.description: Issue triage, PR triage, work routing, hygiene. Keeping work flowing through the factory.

ai_systems.name: AI Systems
ai_systems.description: Model evaluation, context engineering, prompt optimization, local LLM tuning. Making the agents themselves smarter.

ai_architecture.name: AI Architecture
ai_architecture.description: Long-term AI strategy, system design, planning capabilities, architectural evolution of The Factory itself.

product_intelligence.name: Product Intelligence
product_intelligence.description: Market analysis, competitive intelligence, product-market fit, growth metrics. Knowing what to build and why.

research.name: Research & Intelligence
research.description: Technology scouting, deep research, community monitoring, idea discovery. The eyes and ears of The Factory.

product_strategy.name: Product Strategy
product_strategy.description: Product validation, jobs-to-be-done, structure-driven product decisions.

content_culture.name: Content & Culture
content_culture.description: Content strategy, documentation quality, SEO, The Factory's public voice.

agentic_tooling.name: Agentic Tooling
agentic_tooling.description: Agent orchestration, dispatch system, hermes handoff, human-initiated workflows, onboarding communication.
